what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a JPEG image asset named p-13 in the design-source channel under capital-raise; it provides a YAML frontmatter block with id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, source label, author session, creation timestamp, and links, followed by a one-line source ground-truth note.
observations: The asset is an image/jpeg referenced by blob://b2:225a03dd9e90cfd6ea95c471393b22e2
Width and height are both recorded as 0
The author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r and created date is 2026-06-22T11:30:58.935326+00:00
The body after the frontmatter is only a tautological source note
standouts: Image dimensions w and h are 0 despite the file being an image record
Empty links array with no relationships declared
Blob hash is present but no visual description of the image content
concerns: Recording zero width/height for an image makes the metadata incomplete for rendering or search
No description of what p-13 visually contains
No links to related documents or pages
The source note repeats the filename without adding information
notes: A sparse provenance stub for a capital-raise design image that identifies the asset and blob but omits dimensions, content description, and relationships.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-13.jpg contain?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What document or page is this image intended to illustrate?
What does the author_session ch-3mpkjg3r represent?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to serve as a SOURCE design ground-truth record, and it does identify the asset and its storage blob; however, it functions more as a metadata stub because it lacks image dimensions, visual description, and links.
intention_signals: It appears intended to establish a stable, auditable ledger entry that maps a design-source image asset used in capital-raise materials to a specific blob and authorship event.
novelty: The most unusual aspect is that an image metadata record lists width and height as 0 while still claiming an image/jpeg MIME type.
contribution: It contributes a stable identifier and provenance record for the p-13 JPEG asset, including a blob reference, channel/path, author session, and timestamp, which a fused system could use for asset retrieval and audit.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-fronted metadata ledger entry for a JPEG image asset named p-13 in the design-source channel under capital-raise, referencing blob b2:225a03dd9e90cfd6ea95c471393b22e2, with zero width/height, empty links, and a source ground-truth note.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to record the identity, provenance, and storage location of a design-source image used in capital-raise materials.
